notes: Curated seed for the dedicated Signikant LinkedIn test account.
Skills are intentionally included for downstream asset generation even though profile editing still skips them (#228).

intro.headline: AI/ML Engineer at Signikant | TypeScript, Python, LLM Systems, Developer Tooling
intro.location: Copenhagen, Capital Region of Denmark, Denmark

about:
I work on AI systems that need to be useful beyond the demo. At Signikant I build LLM-enabled workflows, evaluation tooling, and operator-facing automation with an emphasis on observability, reliability, and product fit.

Over the last several years I have worked across backend services, developer tooling, and applied machine learning. I enjoy turning ambiguous product goals into clear experiments, instrumentation, and delivery plans that small teams can maintain.

I am especially interested in practical AI engineering: evaluation loops, human-in-the-loop review, trustworthy automation, and the platform work that helps teams move faster with confidence.

experience.title: AI/ML Engineer
experience.description: Build LLM-enabled product workflows, evaluation pipelines, and internal tooling for human-in-the-loop AI systems. Partner with product and engineering on observability, quality gates, and pragmatic rollout strategy.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
experience.description: Led backend and developer tooling projects for data-rich SaaS products, improving deployment confidence, tracing, and operational insight across services.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Worked across Node.js APIs and frontend systems, focusing on workflow automation, internal platform ergonomics, and reliable delivery.

education.description: Focused on machine learning, distributed systems, and software architecture.

education.school: Copenhagen School of Design and Technology
education.description: Coursework included application architecture, databases, HCI, and modern web engineering.

certifications.name: Google Cloud Professional Machine Learning Engineer

projects.title: LLM Evaluation Toolkit
projects.description: Built a lightweight evaluation harness for prompt, retrieval, and regression testing across AI workflow releases.

projects.title: Operator Review Console
projects.description: Created internal review surfaces for human-in-the-loop automation with trace-linked context and clearer feedback loops.

volunteerExperience.description: Mentor students on programming fundamentals, problem-solving, and collaborative software projects.
